questionHtml: Sketch the graph of x against t, labelling the maximum point of the graph with its coordinates.
markschemeHtml:
A1A1

 

Note: Award A1 for correct shape (needs to go through origin, have asymptote at y=0 and a single maximum; condone x<0). Award A1 for correct coordinates of maximum.

 

[2 marks]

meta.title: Sketch the graph of x against t, labelling the maximum point of the graph with its coordinates.
